## Evidence and limitations

## Checks

- [ ] I ran `pnpm format:check`, `pnpm check`, `pnpm test`, and `pnpm build`, or explained below why a check could not run.
- [ ] New behavior has tests at the cheapest useful layer.
- [ ] Parsing/statistics changes update `DEMO-DATA.md` and use synthetic golden/corrupt fixtures where applicable.
- [ ] Rating changes keep the methodology, package, adapters, confidence, eligibility, and scientific claims synchronized.
- [ ] User-facing findings explain limitations and counterevidence and link to an exact tick.
- [ ] This change does not add a cheating verdict, automated enforcement, threshold-based banning, or public accusation.
- [ ] No demo, archive, player identifier, database, secret, source map asset, clip, or other private telemetry is included.
